reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when checked-in tests and current docs directly support the install-channel boundary without claiming live migration or extra install channels.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is deterministic install-channel policy backed by release smoke tests, installer-surface tests, and current user-facing migration guidance.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by refreshed install-channel evidence: release smoke accepts the install.sh path and rejects homebrew, distribution-surface tests keep install.sh valid, and current docs/guides/cli.md plus maintainer docs direct legacy Homebrew users to uninstall and reinstall through install.sh.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when adding install channels, update behavior, release smoke channels, or migration guidance.
